subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Asadu'llah! May you remain sheltered and protected beneath the wings of the Blessed Beauty. From the time you departed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا سید اسدالله در پناه جمال مبارک محفوظ و مصون باش از وقتیکه رفته اید
subcodes.subjects: @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @review of publications
